title: BetterTeamsClaim
description: This plugin serves as an addon for the BetterTeams plugin and is used to create regions for teams.
body:
BetterTeamsClaim is an addon for the popular BetterTeams plugin. It introduces simple and powerful region claiming functionality for teams, allowing for territorial protection, land ownership, and anti-grief features – all integrated directly with BetterTeams.

🔌 Features

    ✅ Claim Regions using two corner points via an interactive GUI.
    ✅ Claim size per level.
    

    🛡️ Region Protection:

        Block break & place protection

        Interact protection (chests, doors, etc.)

        Explosion protection (End Crystals, TNT, Withers, Respawn Anchors, Ghasts)

        Wither block damage protection

        Piston push/pull protection

        Entity grief protection (Endermen, Creepers, etc.)

    👥 Only team owners can create claims.

    🧠 Region size calculation and claim validation.

    ❌ Prevents overlapping claims.

    💬 Customizable messages through MessageManager.

🧩 Requirements

    BetterTeams plugin (this is not a standalone plugin).

    Paper 1.21+ recommended (tested on paper 1.21.1).
    

🛠️ Usage

Players can claim land by:

    Running /claim

    Selecting two corners through a GUI

    Saving the claim
Player can unclaim land by:

    /claim unclaim
    
Admin can delete any claim by:

    /claim deleteclaim name

Permissions:

  There is only one permission for admins and that is betterteamsclaim.admin    

The claim is then protected for the team, and only members of the team can interact within the region.
